Who We Are

We Don't Build Training.
We Build Capability.

The Sutherland LDEx team is your dedicated center of excellence for enterprise learning. We sit at the intersection of instructional psychology, behavioral science, and advanced digital production — which means the programs we deliver actually change how people perform at work, not just how they score on a quiz.

Whether you need to onboard thousands of new hires at speed, upskill a global workforce in a complex domain, or transform a broken learning culture, we bring the strategic thinking and technical horsepower to make it happen.

We're not a vendor. We're a learning partner — embedded, accountable, and invested in your outcomes.

What Makes Us Different →

The Business Case

What You Get When You Partner With LDEx

01

Faster Time to Proficiency

Cut the gap between hire date and full productivity. Our performance-engineered programs use simulation, spaced practice, and adaptive reinforcement to accelerate competence — without cutting corners on quality.

02

Learning That Actually Sticks

Our multi-modality approach combines cognitive science with modern technology to build durable knowledge — so skills transfer to the job, not just to the end-of-module quiz.

03

A Partner You Don't Have to Manage

From needs analysis to post-launch measurement, LDEx handles the complexity. You get clear timelines, transparent communication, and a team that treats your goals as their own accountability.

Why Sutherland LDEx

You Get More Than Content.
You Get Outcomes.

Here's what lands in your hands at the end of every engagement.

Deliverable

Production-Ready Programs, Day One

Every engagement closes with finalized, QA-tested, deployment-ready assets — SCORM packages, facilitator guides, interactive modules — ready to deploy without additional dev work.

Flexibility

Right Tool for Every Context

We don't push the flashiest technology. We match the solution to your learners — whether that's browser-based eLearning, interactive simulations, or full VR, based on your needs and budget.

Scale

Assets Built to Scale Globally

Every program we build is architecture-ready for global deployment — localization-friendly, mobile-responsive, and designed to plug into any enterprise LMS.

Let's Build Something

Your People Are Ready to Grow.
Is Your Learning Keeping Up?

Let's design a learning experience that moves people — and your business metrics.

Home›Products›Managed Learning Services
Products

Managed Learning Services

You brief us, we build it — from scratch to launch, and through every update. LDEx takes complete ownership of the design and development of your learning programs, so your team stays focused on business priorities instead of managing a content production pipeline.

⬇ Download Catalog ← Back to Products
Video Overview

Managed Learning Services — What to Expect

Watch how LDEx takes complete ownership of your learning programs — from brief to launch and beyond — so your team stays focused on what matters most.

The Service

One Partner. End-to-End Design & Development.

From your first brief to your final sign-off — and every content update in between — LDEx manages the complete design and development lifecycle of your learning programs. We build and maintain; you focus on your business.

🔍

Learning Needs Analysis & Strategy

We start by understanding your business goals, audience, and gaps. The result is a clear learning design brief that ensures every course we build is solving the right problem in the right way — before a single slide is written.

✏️

End-to-End Course Design & Development

From instructional design and storyboarding to full production — eLearning, video, simulations, ILT materials — we build every asset to your spec, on time and ready to deploy to your LMS.

🔄

Quality Assurance & Review Management

We manage the review cycle so you don't have to. Stakeholder feedback is consolidated, tracked, and actioned — keeping projects on schedule without revision chaos slowing everything down.

🛠️

Content Updates & Maintenance

Products change. Policies update. Processes evolve. We provide ongoing maintenance to keep your content accurate, compliant, and current — without requiring a new project brief every time.

🎬

Multi-Format Production

One engagement, any format. Whether you need eLearning modules, video, job aids, facilitator guides, or interactive simulations — we produce across all modalities under a single scope of work.

🚀

LMS-Ready Deployment Packages

Every deliverable is packaged and tested for your LMS — SCORM, xAPI, or native format. We ensure everything works before it goes live, so your learners never hit a broken module on day one.

How We Work

From Brief to Live Course — In Weeks

Our engagement model is designed to get from first conversation to finished, deployed learning content as efficiently as possible — with full transparency at every stage.

1

Discovery & Needs Analysis

We meet with your stakeholders, review existing materials, and define the learning objectives, audience profile, and success metrics that will guide every design decision throughout the engagement.

2

Design & Storyboarding

Our instructional designers create the course blueprint — structure, content flow, interactivity, and assessment logic — reviewed and approved by your team before any production begins.

3

Content Production

We build the courses across your chosen modalities — eLearning, video, simulation, ILT materials — with regular check-ins and progress reviews at agreed milestones throughout the build.

4

Review, QA & Revisions

Your team reviews finished drafts through a structured feedback process. We consolidate comments, make revisions, and ensure everything meets your quality bar before final sign-off.

5

Deployment & Handover

We deliver LMS-ready packages, support your deployment, and ensure your team has everything needed to launch confidently. We remain available for post-launch updates and ongoing content maintenance.

Who It's For

MLS Is Built for Organizations That...

01

Need to Scale Content Fast

You have a growing workforce or expanding program portfolio and need a reliable design partner who can meet volume without sacrificing quality or consistency across every deliverable.

02

Want to Free Up Internal Teams

Your L&D team is stretched across strategy, stakeholder management, and measurement. We take the design and production load off their plate entirely so they can focus on what only they can do.

03

Need a Partner Who Stays Accountable

You've worked with vendors who disappear after delivery. LDEx stays engaged — updating content, responding to business changes, and treating your programs as live assets, not closed projects.

Get Started

Ready to Hand Over the Complexity?

Let's talk about what a Managed Learning Services partnership could look like for your organization.

Home›Products›Immersive Learning
Products

Immersive Learning

Put your people inside the experience. From browser-based interactive scenarios to fully immersive environments — we match the level of immersion to your learners' needs, the risk profile of the role, and the technology available to your organization. Every experience is designed to work for your specific context.

← Back to Products
Video Overview

Immersive Learning in Action

See how LDEx creates browser-based to fully immersive environments — matched to your learners' needs, role risk profile, and available technology.

Our Framework

Four Tiers of Immersive Experience

We don't believe in one-size-fits-all. We select the tier that best matches the complexity of the skill, the risk of the role, and the technology available to your learners — from standard browser-based interactive modules through to fully immersive environments.

Foundation

Guided VR Experiences

Linear, short sessions using immediate feedback to build basic familiarity — such as following critical shutdown procedures or learning site layouts.

Enhanced

Explorative VR Scenarios

Semi-open environments where learners navigate different task sequences, providing realistic consequence simulation and summary feedback.

Advanced

Immersive VR Simulations with Complex Branching

High-stakes decision-making within realistic virtual environments, where actions lead to dynamic branching outcomes.

Emerging

Adaptive, Integrated VR Learning Ecosystems

AI and real-time data personalize scenarios and integrate fully with enterprise LMS for tailored professional development.

Feature Comparison

Find the Learning Package That's Right for You

FeatureFoundationEnhancedAdvancedEmerging
Structured linear learning path✓✗✗✗
Semi-open / exploratory environments✗✓✓✓
Fully immersive, realistic environments✗✓✓✓
Stepwise workflows with guidance and hints✓✗✓✓ (AI-driven)
Basic interaction using VR controllers✓✓✓✓
Multiple paths and exploration✗✓✓✓ (adaptive)
Complex branching based on user decisions✗✗✓✓ (AI-adaptive)
Immediate corrective feedback✓✗✓✓ (AI/ML-enhanced)
Generic / summary feedback after session✗✓✓✓
Realistic consequence simulation for mistakes✗✓✓✓
Time pressure and multitasking✗✗✓✓ (adaptive)
Performance scores✗✗✓✓
Detailed analytics✗✓ (activity logs)✓✓ (full dashboards)
Activity logging for performance analysis✗✓✓✓
Adaptive scenario adjustment based on learner history✗✗✗✓
AI/ML for real-time feedback and progression✗✗✗✓
Integration with HR and LMS / enterprise APIs✗✗✗✓
Short sessions to build basic familiarity✓✗✗✗
How We Work

From Concept to Deployed Experience

Our development process is tool-agnostic — we select the right platform based on your learners' access, devices, and budget. Every experience is designed to work for your specific context, not just the most advanced technology available.

1

Performance Analysis & Scenario Mapping

We identify the critical tasks, decision points, and risk scenarios your learners face — then determine the right tier of immersion based on your objectives, learner context, and available delivery platforms.

2

Storyboarding & Interaction Design

Our instructional designers build the branching logic, feedback mechanics, and interaction models — designing experiences that are pedagogically sound and authentic whether delivered in a browser, on a tablet, or through a headset.

3

Production & Development

We build using the platform best suited to your learners' environment — from highly interactive browser-based modules using authoring tools, to fully rendered 3D environments — ensuring the experience is accessible, performant, and engaging.

4

LMS Integration & Deployment

We publish xAPI/SCORM packages and test integration with your existing LMS, providing facilitator guides and learner support materials for deployment at scale.

5

Post-Launch Analytics & Iteration

We monitor completion data, performance trends, and learner feedback — then iterate on the experience to close any remaining skill gaps.

See It in Action

Ready to Put Your Learners
Inside the Experience?

Let's explore whether an immersive solution is right for your most critical skill gap.

Home›Products›Adaptive Learning
Products

Adaptive Learning

Training that learns with you. Personalized paths, smarter progress. From simple decision-point branching to a fully AI-driven ecosystem that tailors every learning journey to the individual — closing skill gaps faster, with less wasted time.

← Back to Products
Our Framework

Four Tiers of Adaptive Learning

Foundation

Basic Branching Adaptive Learning

Uses simple decision points to route learners based on quiz results or choices — directing them to appropriate content paths.

Enhanced

Conditional Path Adaptive Learning

Leverages accumulated learner data to provide tailored remediation or challenge, with multiple conditional paths and personalized feedback.

Advanced

Dynamic Assessment-Driven Adaptive Learning

Uses frequent real-time assessments to adjust difficulty and content dynamically, re-routing learning paths based on performance.

Emerging

Fully Personalized Adaptive Learning Ecosystem

Integrates with enterprise data and uses AI for highly sophisticated, individually tailored learning journeys with rich analytics dashboards.

Feature Comparison

Find the Right Package for You

FeatureFoundationEnhancedAdvancedEmerging
Simple decision points that steer learner flow✓✓✓✓
Linear learning paths✓✗✗✗
Branching based on quiz results / choices✓✓✓✓
Basic quiz scoring to unlock next segments✓✓✓✓
Use of variables to track learner data✗✓✓✓
Multiple conditional paths✗✓✓✓
Tailored remediation or challenge✗✓✓✓
Feedback and hints tailored to learner input✗✓✓✓
Frequent formative assessments✗✗✓✓
Real-time adjustment of difficulty levels✗✗✓✓
Real-time re-routing of learning path✗✗✓✓
Integration with enterprise LMS (SCORM)✓✓✗✗
Integration with enterprise LMS / data systems✗✗✓✓
AI / algorithmic personalization of content paths✗✗✗✓
Rich data dashboards and reporting for managers✗✗✗✓

Ready for Learning That
Adapts to Every Learner?

Let's build a pathway that meets every person where they are.

Products

Gamified Learning

Turn skills into achievements. Learn by playing, level up by doing. From basic points and badges within linear courses to fully immersive 3D/360° environments with real-time data inputs — we design game mechanics that sustain motivation and accelerate mastery.

← Back to Products
Video Overview

Gamified Learning in Action

Watch how LDEx turns skills into achievements — from basic points and badges to fully immersive 3D/360° gamified environments with real-time data.

Our Framework

Four Tiers of Gamified Learning

Foundation

Basic Gamified Learning

Basic modules utilizing simple mechanics such as points and badges, within largely linear courses to motivate learner completion.

Enhanced

Scenario-Based Gamified Learning

Sophisticated content via multi-level, scenario-based games featuring branching paths and adaptive multimedia feedback.

Advanced

Immersive Simulation Learning

Immersive simulation games with complex branching, hands-on realistic interactions, and detailed personalization of the learning experience.

Emerging

Advanced Immersive & Integrated Gamified Learning

Fully immersive 3D/360° virtual reality environments with real-time data inputs to create dynamic, deeply personalized content.

Feature Comparison

Find the Right Package for You

FeatureFoundationEnhancedAdvancedEmerging
Linear course structure✓✓✗✗
Complex branching with multiple outcomes✗✓✓✓
Basic points and badges✓✓✓✓
Timers and scoreboards✗✓✓✓
Multiple-choice quizzes, basic drag-and-drop interactions✓✓✓✓
Advanced interactions (drag/swipe, gesture-like, rich controls)✗✗✓✓
Rich multimedia: video, animation, sound combinations✗✓✓✓
Adaptive feedback based on performance✗✓✓✓
Personalized learner paths✗✗✓✓
Analytics on learner paths / performance✗✗✓✓
3D / 360° environments or VR compatibility✗✗✗✓
Real-time interaction and environmental adjustments✗✗✓ (within simulations)✓ (plus data-driven changes)
Real-time data inputs from external systems✗✗✗✓
API / external tool integration for dynamic content✗✗✗✓
Deep personalization (data- or AI-driven)✗✗✓ (rules/analytics driven)✓ (advanced and integrated)

Ready to Make Learning
Genuinely Engaging?

Let's design a gamified experience your learners will actually want to complete.

Home›Products›Scenario Based Learning
Products

Scenario Based Learning

Real choices. Real consequences. Real learning that sticks. From simple linear scenarios for compliance training to integrated adaptive ecosystems with real-time data — we build decision-driven experiences that develop judgment, not just knowledge recall.

← Back to Products
Video Overview

Scenario Based Learning in Action

See how LDEx builds real-choice, real-consequence learning — from conversational AI scenarios to fully integrated adaptive ecosystems.

Our Framework

Four Tiers of Scenario Based Learning

Foundation

Foundational Linear Scenarios

Simple linear scenarios using a fixed sequence of decisions and basic interactions, suitable for compliance and mandatory training content.

Enhanced

Branching Decision Scenarios

Multiple decision branches with distinct outcomes, promoting critical thinking through adaptive feedback that reflects learner decisions.

Advanced

Immersive Role-Play & Simulation

High interactivity within detailed environments, featuring realistic tasks, multimedia, and personalized learner paths and scoring.

Emerging

Integrated Adaptive Scenario Ecosystems

Real-time data and external system integration delivering highly adaptive, personalized learning journeys, often within virtual environments.

Feature Comparison

Find the Right Package for You

FeatureFoundationEnhancedAdvancedEmerging
Fixed sequence of decisions✓✗✗✗
Branching / personalization✓✗✗✗
Multiple decision branches with distinct outcomes✗✓✓✓
Use of variables / triggers to track learner choices✗✓✓✓
Adaptive feedback reflecting learner decisions✗✓✓✓
Basic interactions (quizzes, click-to-continue)✓✓✓✓
High-interactivity (drag/swipe, input-based, timed actions)✗✗✓✓
Detailed, realistic environments✗✗✓✓
Personalized learner paths and scoring✗✗✓✓ (more advanced)
Use of multimedia (video, animation)✗✓✓✓
Virtual / 3D / 360° scenario assets✗✗✗✓
Real-time adaptation based on learner data✗✗✗✓
Integration with external systems (HRIS, CRM, APIs)✗✗✗✓
Advanced analytics and performance insights✗✗✓ (scenario-level)✓ (enterprise-grade)

Ready to Build Learning
That Develops Real Judgment?

Let's design scenarios grounded in the real decisions your people face every day.

Products

Video Based Learning

Watch, learn, and act. Stories that teach, visuals that move. From simple explainer videos with AI voiceovers to immersive 360°/VR video ecosystems with AI-driven real-time adaptation — we produce video content that earns attention and builds knowledge.

* Pricing excludes standalone video development costs where applicable.

← Back to Products
Video Overview

Video Based Learning in Action

Explore how LDEx produces video learning — from simple explainer videos to immersive 360°/VR experiences with AI-driven real-time adaptation.

Our Framework

Four Tiers of Video Based Learning

Foundation

Basic Explainer Videos

Straightforward, short, non-interactive content primarily using simple graphics, motion text overlays, and AI voiceover narration.

Enhanced

Interactive and Personalized Videos

Branching narratives and embedded quizzes, leveraging Synthesia AI avatars and Canva assets to deliver tailored, personalized content.

Advanced

Simulation and Scenario-Based Videos

Advanced visual effects and scripted role-plays to simulate real-world situations with multiple potential outcomes and rich production quality.

Emerging

Immersive and Adaptive Video Learning Ecosystems

360°/VR content and AI-driven real-time adaptation to create dynamic, personalized learning experiences at the highest production level.

Feature Comparison

Find the Right Package for You

FeatureFoundationEnhancedAdvancedEmerging
Linear Video✓✗✗✗
Interactive Video✗✓✓✓
Standard 2–5 minute duration✓✓✗ (varies)✗ (varies)
Simple motion graphics and text overlays✓✓✓✓
AI Voiceover narration✓✓✓✓
Use of Synthesia AI avatars✓✓✓✓
Branching video paths based on user choices✗✓✓✓
Embedded quizzes / clickable hotspots✗✓✓✓
Personalized video experiences✗✓✓✓ (most advanced)
Scenario-driven storytelling with multiple outcomes✗✗✓✓
Advanced visual effects and transitions✗✗✗✓ (highest level)

360° / VR video content✗✗✗✓

Home›Products›Simulation Based Learning
Products

Simulation Based Learning

Practice without the pressure. Safe-to-fail spaces for real-world mastery. From simple procedural simulations to fully integrated adaptive ecosystems — we build environments where your people can practice critical skills repeatedly, without risk to operations, systems, or customers.

← Back to Products
Video Overview

Simulation Based Learning in Action

Watch how LDEx builds safe-to-fail simulation spaces — from simple procedural task practice to fully integrated adaptive simulation ecosystems.

Our Framework

Four Tiers of Simulation Based Learning

Foundation

Basic Procedural Simulations

Simple, repetitive task-based simulations with guided steps and immediate feedback to build mastery of fundamental skills.

Enhanced

Interactive Scenario Simulations

Multiple decision points and contextual feedback to guide learner choices through realistic, consequence-driven task environments.

Advanced

Realistic Simulations

Complex branching, time-bound challenges, and highly detailed environments demanding real skill application under realistic conditions.

Emerging

Fully Integrated Adaptive Simulation Ecosystems

AI-driven personalization, enterprise system integration, and sophisticated performance analytics for the highest fidelity practice environments.

Feature Comparison

Find the Right Package for You

FeatureFoundationEnhancedAdvancedEmerging
Linear✓✓✗✗

Home›Products›eLearning Module
Products

eLearning Module

Straightforward. Structured. Solid learning delivered anytime, anywhere. Standard eLearning Modules are built with a linear structure, basic multimedia, and rapid development via Articulate Rise — making them ideal for compliance training, onboarding, and structured knowledge delivery at scale.

← Back to Products
Our Framework

Standard eLearning Modules

Standard eLearning Modules are characterized by their linear structure, use of basic multimedia, and rapid development primarily via Articulate Rise — making them ideal for straightforward content delivery.

Foundation

Standard eLearning Modules

Linear, SCORM-compliant modules with text, images, basic multimedia, and knowledge checks. Mobile-responsive and deployable to any LMS.

With Enhancements

Modules with Interactivity

Same solid foundation enhanced with drag-and-drop, accordion, hotspot, flashcards, and interactive blocks using authoring tool built-in features.

Feature Overview

What's Included

FeatureIncluded
Linear course structure✓
Mobile-friendly, responsive design (Android & iOS)✓
Text and image-based content✓
Simple multimedia (basic video / audio)✓
Basic quizzes and knowledge checks✓
Immediate basic feedback on quiz questions✓
SCORM 1.2, 2004✓
Simple scenario-based (limited to authoring tool)✓
Light / minimal branching✗
Interactivity (drag-and-drop, accordion, hotspot, flashcards) — authoring tool built-in✗ (enhancement)
Complex branching / decision-driven paths✗
Adaptive or personalized learning paths✗
Rich analytics beyond standard LMS tracking✗
Deep system integration beyond LMS (HRIS/CRM)✗

Need Solid, Scalable Learning
Deployed Fast?

Let's build eLearning modules that deliver knowledge reliably — on any device, in any LMS.

Home›Products›ILT / VILT
Products

ILT / VILT

Guided by experts. Driven by interaction. The human touch, delivered live. We design instructor-led and virtual instructor-led programs — in-room or online — where your facilitators are set up to shine and every participant leaves with something they can use tomorrow.

← Back to Products
Our Framework

Two Tiers of ILT / VILT Delivery

Foundation

Standard ILT/VILT Delivery

Fundamental instructor-led training focusing on clear content transmission, using fully scripted slide decks, PDF handouts, and supplementary Word guides with embedded quizzes.

Enhanced

Enhanced ILT/VILT with Interactive Elements

Significantly elevated engagement through sophisticated interactive elements: branching scenarios within slides, animated media-rich content, detailed workbooks, and tech tools like breakout rooms and advanced polls for VILT.

Feature Comparison

Foundation vs Enhanced

FeatureFoundationEnhanced
Clear, structured instructor-led delivery✓✓
Use of PowerPoint slide decks as primary medium✓✓ (more advanced, animated)
Fully scripted slide decks✓✓
Printable PDF handouts with key points✓✓
Supplementary Word guides for exercises/reference✓✓ (more detailed)
Minimal interactive technology (basic polls / Q&A in VILT)✓✓
Embedded quizzes within slides✓✓
Branching scenarios within slide content✗✓
Animated / media-rich PowerPoint content✗✓
Enhanced PDF workbooks with exercises and reflection prompts✗✓
Space for participant notes in workbooks✗✓
Detailed Word manuals with scenarios, templates, and checklists✗✓
Tech tools: breakout rooms and advanced polls in VILT✗✓
Overall learner engagement above traditional lecture✗✓

Ready for Instructor-Led Learning
That Actually Engages?

Let's design a live learning experience your facilitators love to deliver.

Home›Products›Interactive Quizzes & Assessment
Products

Interactive Quizzes & Assessment

Measure what matters. Fast insights for smarter decisions. From basic recall assessments to advanced adaptive quizzes with scoring logic, detailed analytics, and LMS tracking — we build assessments that tell you what your learners actually know, not just what they clicked.

← Back to Products
Our Framework

Two Tiers of Assessment Design

Foundation

Basic Recall-Based Assessments

Simple recall-based questions (MCQs, true/false, fill-in-the-blank) with randomized question sets and weighted scoring. No adaptive logic, minimal feedback.

Enhanced

Advanced Interactive Assessments

Enhanced with immediate rich feedback, contextual hints, randomized or adaptive questions, scoring logic, detailed analytics, and full LMS tracking via SCORM/xAPI.

Feature Comparison

Foundation vs Enhanced

FeatureFoundationEnhanced
Simple recall question types (MCQ, true/false, fill-in-the-blank)✓✓
Additional complex item types (scenario-based, drag-and-drop, matching)✗✓
Summative / certification use✗✓
Immediate basic feedback (right/wrong)✓✓ (richer, per response)
Contextual hints and explanations✗✓
Randomized question sets / pools✓✓
Adaptive questions or paths based on learner responses✗✓
Weighted scoring, pass/fail rules, percent-based scoring✓✓
Minimal analytics (scores, completion only — SCORM, xAPI)✓✗
Alignment to learning objectives (remembering, understanding, applying)✓✓

Ready to Measure What
Your Learners Actually Know?

Let's design assessments that surface real gaps and inform real decisions.

Our Differentiator

The LDEx Edge

We could tell you we're different. Every vendor does. Instead, here's how we're built: six principles, four capability pillars, a proven delivery framework, and a compliance commitment that protects you and your learners — everywhere.

Video Overview

See the LDEx Edge in Action

A quick look at how LDEx engineers learning experiences that build real capability, accelerate performance, and deliver measurable ROI — from day one.

Our Philosophy

Six Principles That Drive Every Decision

These aren't values on a wall. They're the criteria we use when making design decisions, scoping engagements, and measuring success.

🌐

Experiential by Design

We build environments where learners do things, not watch things. Active application beats passive consumption — every time, on every topic, at every level.

🧩

Modular & Scalable

Every program we build is architected for reuse. Modules can be repurposed, localized, and recombined — protecting your investment as your organization evolves.

🎯

Learner-First, Business-Driven

We design for the person doing the work — because engaged learners build skills faster and transfer them more reliably to the job.

⚡

Technology as Enabler

We're technology-agnostic, not technology-obsessed. We select the tool that best serves the learning objective — matching solutions to what learners actually have access to.

📈

Measured Against Business Results

We commit to success metrics before we start designing. Kirkpatrick L4, time-to-proficiency, error-rate reduction — if it doesn't move a needle, we redesign it.

🤝

Partnership Over Vendor Relationship

We embed with your team. We flag problems before you do. We act like your most invested internal colleague — because your success is our reputation.

Capabilities & Products

Four Strategic Pillars

Our capability model covers every dimension of modern enterprise learning.

01
Pillar 1

Capability & Corporate Learning

  • Pre-Hire & Early-Hire Microlearning — build readiness before day one
  • Co-Branded Domain & Industry Academies for client programs
  • Leadership Development — from first-time managers to senior leaders
  • Frontline Competency Development at scale for complex service environments
  • End-to-End AI Academy — AI literacy from frontline to C-suite
02
Pillar 2

Program-Specific Learning Design

  • Full Re-design of existing programs driving Run Better & Run Different mandates
  • Technology-enabled programs that measurably reduce training duration without reducing quality
  • Foundational Soft & Meta Skills curriculum accelerating speed-to-competency
  • AI-Driven Conversational Practice (Zenarate) for customer-facing roles
03
Pillar 3

Knowledge Management

  • Shift from document-heavy libraries to answer-led, searchable knowledge systems
  • Modular, reusable knowledge architecture built for change and maintenance
  • Decision-guided self-service tools and visual explainers for complex processes
  • Search & findability enhancement across existing enterprise platforms
  • Governance and ownership models that keep knowledge accurate long-term
04
Pillar 4

AI & Tech-Driven Standalone Solutions

  • Fully-built Learning Simulators for process, software, and equipment training
  • Immersive Walkthroughs & Explainers across browser and device formats
  • AI-Driven Role-Play Engines (Zenarate, Gen-Alpha & Aiden) for practice at scale
  • Cognitive AI transformation of legacy content into modern learning assets
  • World-Class Production Hub — cinematic video, motion graphics, 3D rendering
How We Work

Our Journey Mapping Framework

A learner-centric design process ensuring every touchpoint — from intake to measurement — is intentional and evidence-based.

01

Discover

Stakeholder interviews, audience analysis, goal alignment

02

Define

Learning objectives, performance gaps, modality selection

03

Design

Instructional design, storyboarding, rapid prototyping

04

Develop

Content production, multimedia, QA testing

05

Deploy

LMS integration, rollout support, change management

06

Measure

Kirkpatrick L1–L4, analytics, continuous improvement

Delivery Framework

The ADDIE Model

Five phases. Clear milestones. Full accountability at every stage — structured around the industry-standard ADDIE framework.

A
Phase 01

Analyze

  • Define scope & objectives
  • Identify stakeholders & KPIs
  • Approve project charter
  • Analysis of existing curriculum
Attendees Project Sponsor · Project Manager · Steering Committee · Key Stakeholders
Output Analysis of existing curriculum & process
D
Phase 02

Design

  • Build detailed plan & timeline
  • Resource matrix
  • Review risk mitigation strategies
  • SME alignment & sign-off
Attendees Project Manager · Instructional Designer · Sponsor · SME · QA Lead
Output LDEx Solution Document · SOW
D
Phase 03

Develop

  • Develop content, reviews & revisions
  • QA checks & pilot test
  • Milestone reviews & sign-offs
  • Multimedia assets & interactivity
Attendees Project Manager · ID Team · SME · QA · Stakeholders as needed
Output LDEx Solution Development Artefacts
I
Phase 04

Implement

  • Identify participants & notification
  • Enrollment management
  • Train-the-trainer workshop
  • LMS publishing & rollout
Attendees Project Manager · Sponsor · ID Lead · QA · Stakeholders
Output Implemented curriculum · Testing Documents
E
Phase 05

Evaluate

  • Summarize evaluation & KPI impact
  • Learnings from project
  • Documentation & project closure
  • Kirkpatrick L1–L4 review
Attendees Project Manager · Sponsor · ID Team · QA · SME · Steering Committee
Output KPI Impact Calculation · Project Closure Approvals
⟳ Ad-hoc Reports & Feedback loops during development — Project Manager, Designers/Developers, QA, SMEs

Data Protection & Compliance

Your Learner Data Is Safe With Us

We take data protection seriously — because your learners deserve privacy, and your organization deserves a partner you can trust.

GDPR Compliant by Design

All LDEx learning programs and data processes are designed in full compliance with the GDPR and applicable data privacy legislation. We operate under Sutherland Global Services' enterprise data governance framework, audited annually.

  • Learner data collected only with lawful basis and clear purpose
  • Data minimization: we collect what's needed to deliver and measure learning
  • Learner rights respected: access, correction, erasure, and portability on request
  • Data processed and stored within approved geographic boundaries
  • All third-party tools assessed for GDPR compliance before integration
  • Breach notification procedures aligned to 72-hour regulatory requirement
  • Data Processing Agreements (DPAs) available for all client engagements
  • Compliant with ISO 27001 and SOC 2 at the Sutherland enterprise level
🔒
GDPRCompliant
🛡️
ISO 27001Framework
✅
SOC 2Standards
🌍
EU/UKData Residency

For Prospective Clients

We're happy to provide our DPA, Privacy Impact Assessment templates, and full data handling documentation as part of the procurement process.
